name: Kamal Singh
text:
Premium experience is gone. You now have to place your own order. Too much noise in their cooking area. They have reduced their prices as well to compete with other Pizza brands.

Just to give you an idea about how horrid their service is, I had to ask for water 3 times.

It takes forever for them to serve your order. They keep saying five more minutes. More than 20 minutes had passed and they had not served a single dish, not even our mocktails.

Bread strix were not at all soft.
Corn on veggie feast pizza is not fresh and so were the tomatoes.
Mushroom pasta looks, tastes horrid.
responseFromOwnerText: Dear Kamal Singh,We sincerely apologize for the experience and want to have a closer look at it. Please send us a private message with your Order ID, email ID, and phone number along with the concern on hutcares@yum.com so that we can look into it -Team Pizza Hut

text:
I was not much happy with the service and taste . The person who took our order said that the Triple chicken feast pizza will be full of cheese but no it was not and they have written in toppings were corn too ... But it was not there ... Fooling

Outlet is nice but the service was not that great.

So with a prompt response from Mr Neeraj (manager), he assured me to serve the pizza at my residence. I was. Happy with that but honestly i want the service at the outlet should be great too...

I have also uploaded the photographs as well
